title: Validation Rules Family Schema
description: Phase 1 Step 2 — populated validation-rules family schema for the SP Project Control Center machine-readable Project Site Template Contract. Defines the rule-record shape, the 13 rule categories, the 8 enforcement layers, and the initial 30 rules (VR-01 through VR-30) extracted verbatim from the Phase 0 Step 2 Validation Rule Table Plan. JSON Schema alone cannot enforce cross-layer behavior; rules with `enforcementLayer: "Cross-Layer"` (or with multiple participating layers in their notes) are enforced by SPFx code review, backend routing, governance, and documentation. The rules array is append-only as later Phase 1 steps surface additional bindings. Traces to Phase 0 Step 2 Schema Family Taxonomy and Standard Project Site Template Contract §3.2, §4B.0, §4B.1, §11, §13, §17, §18, §19, §19A, §20, §22.

rules.description: Validation rule records consumed by downstream layers. Append-only.

decisionClosureStatus.description: Decision Closure Register status — the canonical four-value mvp_status enum.

enforcementLayer.description: Single allowed enforcement-layer token. For rules that span multiple layers, set this to `Cross-Layer` and list participating layers in `notes`.

participatingLayers.description: When enforcementLayer is `Cross-Layer` or the rule spans multiple layers, list each participating layer here.

enforcementLayerCatalog.name: Schema
enforcementLayerCatalog.description: Encoded directly in JSON Schema validators.

enforcementLayerCatalog.name: Provisioning
enforcementLayerCatalog.description: Enforced by provisioning logic at site creation.

enforcementLayerCatalog.name: Site Health
enforcementLayerCatalog.description: Detected and reported by Site Health drift checks.

enforcementLayerCatalog.name: Cross-Layer
enforcementLayerCatalog.description: Multiple layers participate. Schema alone cannot enforce a runtime call boundary; participating layers are listed per-rule.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Allowed values: commercial, multifamily, municipal, luxury_residential, environmental.
initialRules.notes: Five-value enum binding for ProjectType.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Allowed values: lead, estimating, preconstruction, active_construction, closeout, warranty.
initialRules.notes: Six-value enum binding for ProjectStage.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Allowed values: Active, On Hold, Closed, Archived.
initialRules.notes: Four-value enum binding for ProjectStatus.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Anti-regression: Archived is projectStatus, not projectStage. Archived must not appear as a valid projectStage value.
initialRules.notes: Forbidden-value rule on the projectStage enum.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Anti-regression: active_construction is a projectStage value only, not a projectType value. active_construction must not appear as a valid projectType value.
initialRules.notes: Forbidden-value rule on the projectType enum.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Anti-regression: forbidden values preconstruction_only, warranty_closeout must not appear as valid projectType values.
initialRules.notes: Forbidden-value rule on the projectType enum.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Module visibility is keyed on projectStage.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares the visibility rule structure; SPFx enforces the runtime visibility decision.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Vertical seeding (e.g., per-ProjectType seed sets) is keyed on projectType.
initialRules.notes: Provisioning logic applies seed rules at site creation. Schema declares seed-rule structure; the seeding action is provisioning behavior.

initialRules.ruleStatement: On projectStatus -> Archived: site is renamed (§5.6), libraries are flipped read-only, metadata is frozen.
initialRules.notes: Rename and read-only flips are backend operations triggered by status transition; Site rename driven by provisioning utility.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Default 5280. Configuration, not secret. Three forms: canonical procore_company_id, surface ProcoreCompanyId, business 'Procore Company ID = 5280'. Site Health flags blank or non-5280 values unless an approved multi-company exception exists.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares default and three forms; Site Health enforces the value check at runtime.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Procore mapping owner is Project Manager; fallback owner is Project Executive when no PM is assigned. Project Accountant is not the mapping owner.
initialRules.notes: Schema encodes the allowed ownership set; backend enforces the assignment rule.

initialRules.ruleStatement: SPFx must not call the Procore API directly. All Procore traffic routes through backend/functions/ with auth, secrets, rate limits, and audit owned by the backend.
initialRules.notes: JSON Schema alone cannot enforce a runtime call boundary; the rule is enforced by SPFx code review, backend routing, and a documented governance rule.

initialRules.appliesTo: (all schemas, all SharePoint surfaces, all SPFx surfaces, all markdown docs, all repo source, all client config)
initialRules.ruleStatement: No Procore client IDs, client secrets, refresh tokens, DMSA credentials, OAuth secrets, or environment credentials may appear in any schema, SharePoint list, SPFx surface, markdown doc, repo source, or client configuration.
initialRules.notes: Schema enforces by omitting fields; reviews enforce policy; backend stores secrets in key vault.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Sage Intacct is the accounting book of record. Procore-sourced financial data is operational / project-management financial state and must be labeled as Procore-sourced.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares source_system and operational-vs-accounting classification; documentation enforces labeling discipline.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Procore directory comparison is read-only. Comparison must not auto-grant SharePoint access.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares the comparison shape but does not authorize permissions.

initialRules.ruleStatement: SharePoint is not a full Procore mirror. Allowed shapes: mapping, summary, exception, action queue, sync health, audit, object link. Forbidden shapes: raw payload, high-volume detail history, bulk attachment, full binary mirror.
initialRules.notes: Schema enforces allowed-shape lists and rejects forbidden shapes; backend enforces sync logic.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Normal users do not use native SharePoint permission / settings / edit screens for normal workflows. All access mutations route through backend/functions/ and are audit-logged.
initialRules.notes: SPFx UI directs users away from native screens; backend enforces audit logging; governance reviews enforce the no-bypass policy.

initialRules.ruleStatement: External (guest) users are deferred from MVP. External-user permission templates exist as mvp_status: deferred placeholders only.
initialRules.notes: Schema marks external-user templates mvp_status: Deferred.

initialRules.ruleStatement: HBI Assistant is deferred from MVP. Module entry exists as mvp_status: deferred placeholder only.
initialRules.notes: Schema marks the HBI Assistant module mvp_status: Deferred.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Procore write-back is deferred from MVP.
initialRules.notes: Schema omits write-back fields; governance enforces no-write-back policy until ADR.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Severity values: Info, Warning, Blocking, Repair Required, Security Risk.
initialRules.notes: Five-value severity enum binding.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Repair Automation tiers: T1 auto, T2 approval, T3 IT security, T4 manual only.
initialRules.notes: Four-value repair-tier enum binding.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Provisioning Validation Contract: stages, post-provision validation, audit records, rollback / repair references.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares the validation contract structure; backend executes.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Decision Closure Register statuses: Frozen for MVP, Runtime Configuration, Deferred, Proof-Gated only.
initialRules.notes: Four-value mvp_status enum binding. Phase 1 Step 2 reconciles enums.schema.json and validation-rules.schema.json to this canonical taxonomy; the 12 untouched family skeletons retain temporary scaffold-local shorthand pending per-family extraction.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Lookup fields reference existing list rows by stable identifier.
initialRules.notes: Schema enforces referential integrity by stable IDs.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Pages reference modules by stable module identifier.
initialRules.notes: Schema enforces referential integrity.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Phase-based access managers per ProjectStage.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares the access manager binding by stage; SPFx and backend enforce.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Microsoft 365 Group / Teams connection posture frozen for MVP; no secrets in client surfaces.
initialRules.notes: Schema marks posture frozen; backend manages connection.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Status-driven read-only behavior for Closed and Archived projects.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares the rule; SPFx and backend enforce read-only.

initialRules.ruleStatement: Construction-phase access managers apply when projectStage = active_construction.
initialRules.notes: Schema declares the conditional binding; SPFx and backend enforce activation.
